trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: verified live main head after PR #24 merged and before PR #25 was refreshed; live Git determines the current head

workstreams.scope: Fail-closed collector replacement execution contract, inactive workflow candidate, deterministic validator, tests, design documentation, and governance state only; no active workflow or Azure mutation.
